early_bird.name: Maagang Ibon
early_bird.description: 5 magkakaibang araw na may session bago mag-8am.

night_owl.name: Night Owl
night_owl.description: 5 magkakaibang araw na may session pagkatapos ng 10pm.

rt_500.name: Mabilis na Reflex
rt_500.description: Average reaction time < 500ms na may ≥70% accuracy.

flash.name: Flash
flash.description: Average reaction time < 400ms na may ≥70% accuracy.

rt_300.name: Kidlat
rt_300.description: Average reaction time < 300ms na may ≥70% accuracy.

consistent.name: Consistent
consistent.description: RT standard deviation < 100ms (≥10 sagot ang kailangan).

no_pause.name: Walang Tigil
no_pause.description: 5 magkakasunod na session na walang pause na may ≥75% accuracy.

steady_hands.name: Mga Matatag na Kamay
steady_hands.description: Walang maling input sa session (≥80% accuracy).

persistent.name: Nagpupursige
persistent.description: 3 session sa parehong araw pagkatapos ng pagkabigo.

second_wind.name: Pangalawang Hangin
second_wind.description: Bumuti ang d-prime sa pagitan ng kalahati 1 at 2 (d′ ≥ 2.0 kailangan).

plateau_breaker.name: Plateau Breaker
plateau_breaker.description: Umunlad pagkatapos ng 10+ session sa parehong level.

synchronized.name: Naka-synchronize
synchronized.description: Nasa loob ng 5% ang Audio at Visual score (≥60% kailangan).

dual_master.name: Dual Master
dual_master.description: Audio AT Visual > 85% sa parehong session (≥6 lure/modality).

dual_elite.name: Dual Elite
dual_elite.description: Audio AT Visual > 90% sa parehong session sa N ≥ 3 (≥6 lure/modality).

metronome.name: Ang Metronome
metronome.description: RT variance < 50ms sa ≥20 trial (aktibong sagot kailangan).

flow_state.name: Estado ng Biyaya
flow_state.description: Nakita ang flow sa buong session.

sang_froid.name: Malamig ang Ulo
sang_froid.description: Walang sunod-sunod na error pagkatapos ng isang error (≥70% accuracy).

imperturbable.name: Hindi Nababagabag
imperturbable.description: Buong session na walang nawawalang pokus (≥60% accuracy).

comeback_strong.name: Matinding Comeback
comeback_strong.description: Tinalo ang iyong d-prime record pagkatapos ng 3+ araw na wala (d′ ≥ 2.5).
